login.subtitle: Enter your 4-digit restaurant code
login.invalid_code: The code was not accepted. Please try again.

dashboard.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
dashboard.hero_copy: See what is happening today, confirm pending reservations, and keep the bot under control without jumping between pages.
dashboard.quick_actions_copy: Export data, add a manual reservation, or refresh the screen.
dashboard.table_copy: Each action goes straight to the backend and updates the status without reloading the page.
dashboard.empty_copy: Once the bot starts receiving messages, reservations will appear here automatically.
dashboard.manual_copy: Use this form when a reservation comes in by phone or in person.

setup.page_title: Activate your bot from one single page
setup.page_copy: Add the restaurant basics, define how the bot should speak, and optionally add your AI key. When you click activate, we create the restaurant, PIN, and owner access for you.
setup.jerry_copy: Let's activate your bot in 2 minutes.
setup.panel_item_1_copy: The bot answers opening hours, reservations, and common questions without taking your time.
setup.panel_item_2_copy: Description and personality give the bot your restaurant's voice.
setup.panel_item_3_copy: As soon as it activates, we save your PIN and owner key so you can open the dashboard immediately.
setup.secure_note: Keys are stored encrypted. We only use the data needed for the bot to speak accurately with your guests.
setup.placeholder_description: Describe your restaurant â€” what cuisine you serve, how many tables you have, where you are located, and what makes the experience special. The bot uses this when speaking with guests.
setup.placeholder_personality:
How should the bot speak? Example:
- Speak like a warm and professional waiter
- Always say welcome when someone writes
- Suggest the dish of the day when guests ask about the menu
- Do not share prices unless the guest asks
- When you are unsure, say: We will connect you with the owner
setup.description_hint: ðŸ’¡ The more details you give, the better the bot will speak with your guests
setup.personality_hint: ðŸ’¡ This tells the bot HOW to speak â€” like a waiter, a host, or a trusted guide
setup.api_key_required: Enter an API key before testing it.
setup.api_key_valid: API key accepted. Ready to activate.
setup.submit_copy: When you activate the bot, we create the restaurant, generate the login PIN, and save the owner key so the dashboard opens immediately.
setup.activating: We are activating your bot... â³
setup.success_copy: Save these credentials â€” you will need them for login and owner access.
setup.success_banner: The bot was activated successfully. Your dashboard is ready.

help.restaurant_name: The name that appears when the bot speaks with guests
help.whatsapp_number: The number where guests message you. The bot replies from this number.
help.business_hours: The bot will automatically share your opening hours with guests
help.language: The main language the bot should use with your guests
help.description: The bot uses this to answer questions about your restaurant
help.bot_personality: The communication style â€” formal, friendly, humorous, and so on

settings.ai_note: Your AI assistant handles reservations, common guest questions, and reminders around the clock.
settings.notifications_desc: Control how and when you receive alerts
settings.email_notif_desc: Receive daily summaries and important alerts by email
settings.whatsapp_reminders_desc: Send reservation reminders to guests over WhatsApp
settings.daily_report_desc: Receive a daily summary of reservations and performance
settings.feedback_requests_desc: Automatically ask guests for feedback after their visit
settings.reset_data_desc: Remove all reservations, guests, and campaign data
settings.delete_restaurant_desc: Permanently delete this restaurant and all associated data
settings.danger_warning: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone. Please contact your administrator if you need a reset or deletion.

help.address: The address shown in your restaurant profile and used by the bot for more accurate replies.
help.timezone: Used so reservations, reports, and notifications appear at the correct local time.

guests.title: Guest Profiles
guests.search_placeholder: Search guests by name or phone...
guests.empty_sub: Each guest profile is stored here as soon as the first reservation comes in.

messages.select_hint: Choose one from the list to open the thread
messages.no_match: We could not find conversations that match your search.
messages.no_conversations: No conversations yet. When guests write, they will appear here.

demo.title: Live Demo Bot
demo.subtitle: Try how your bot would answer in real situations: opening hours, bookings, cancellations, and menu questions.
demo.scenario_1_copy: Visitor asks if the restaurant is open today
demo.scenario_2_copy: Bot continues conversation and finds the best time
demo.scenario_3_copy: When customer asks about vegetarian options
demo.welcome: Welcome to the Te Ta AI demo. Choose a scenario below or type your question.
demo.error_reply: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
demo.reply_open: Yes, we're open from 11:00 to 21:00! Would you like to make a reservation?
demo.reply_tomorrow: Of course! What time would work for you?
demo.reply_vegetarian: Yes! We have several vegetarian dishes: pasta primavera, seasonal salad, and mushroom risotto.
demo.reply_cancel: Of course. Please share your name or phone number so I can find your reservation.
demo.reply_special: Today's daily special is [dish name] for [price]. Would you like to order it?

microcopy.webhook_failed: The connection dropped. We are reconnecting automatically...
microcopy.api_invalid: The key was not accepted. Check it and try again.
microcopy.database_error: Something went wrong. We are fixing it â€” please try again in 1 minute.
microcopy.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
microcopy.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again in a few seconds.
microcopy.network_error: Your internet connection dropped. Check your WiFi.
microcopy.missing_field: Please fill in all required fields.
microcopy.invalid_phone: That phone number does not look right.
microcopy.no_reservations: No reservations yet. When guests write, they will appear here.
microcopy.no_guests: No guests yet. The list grows automatically with every reservation.

error.not_found_desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
error.server_desc: We hit an unexpected error. Please try again in a moment.

ai_bot.system_language: Always respond in the language the customer uses.
